prompt: Using REFERENCE_0, extract only the outfit and turn it into a clean fashion magazine product showcase on a light warm-beige background. Remove the person entirely and display the clothing as separate laid-flat items: 1 cropped short-sleeve top centered near the top and 1 pair of shorts centered below it. Preserve the vivid multicolor art print from the reference, but present the garments neatly, as if for an editorial catalog page, with soft studio shadows. Add 1 circular fabric-detail inset at the lower left showing a close-up of the print. Add elegant editorial typography and thin callout lines, with 4 text blocks total: a large headline block at upper left reading “COLORFUL ART SET UP” with small Japanese copy above and below, 1 right-side block labeled “TOPS” with Japanese description, 1 lower-right block labeled “BOTTOMS” with Japanese description, and 1 lower-left block labeled “FABRIC” with short Japanese description. Keep the overall look refined, minimal, premium, and like a clothing introduction page in a magazine.
